title: i-Differentiate Area 4 — Design Spec
summary: Authoritative design spec for a single-file HTML club-performance leaderboard replacing the Area 4 gamification Excel workbook.
scope_summary: Defines the complete UI design system (color/typography/spacing tokens, custom 'A4 Kit' component library, five-screen inventory) and architecture for a single-file, client-only HTML leaderboard app for Area 4, District 90 Toastmasters. Covers the localStorage data model, exact workbook-parity scoring engine formulas, TMI CSV integration boundaries, seed data, error handling, non-functional constraints, and testing approach.
scope: five-screen tabbed UI (Leaderboard, TMI Data, Manual Entry, Trends, Settings)
Chart.js CDN integration with offline fallback
seed data for six Area 4 clubs
notes: Manifest declared type SPEC with precedence 0 and LOCKED status; content signals (data model, scoring formulas, integration boundaries, NFRs) strongly confirm SPEC. Also contains an autonomous-decisions table with ADR-like content, subsumed under the locked spec.
